entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Cultivated groundnut or peanut (Arachis hypogaea), an allopolyploid oilseed crop with a large and complex genome

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The output level of the crop, which is currently low in the semiarid tropics

entities.name: SEMIARID TROPICS
entities.description: The geographical region where groundnut productivity is a major challenge

entities.name: GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of the genome, including sequence assemblies and resequencing

entities.name: GENOME SEQUENCING
entities.description: The process of assembling genome sequences of wild and cultivated groundnut

entities.name: WILD DIPLOID PROGENITORS
entities.description: Ancestral diploid species of groundnut

entities.name: WILD TETRAPLOID
entities.description: Wild tetraploid species of groundnut

entities.name: CULTIVATED TETRAPLOIDS
entities.description: Cultivated tetraploid species of groundnut

entities.name: RESEQUENCING
entities.description: The process of sequencing diverse germplasm lines

entities.name: GERMPLASM
entities.description: Genetic resources in the form of diverse lines

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOME ATLAS
entities.description: A genome-wide map of gene expression

entities.name: GENOTYPING ASSAYS
entities.description: High and low-density assays used for genetic analysis

entities.name: TRAIT MAPPING
entities.description: High-resolution mapping of traits using diversity panels and genetic populations

entities.name: GERMPLASM DIVERSITY PANELS
entities.description: Collections of diverse germplasm used for trait mapping

entities.name: MULTI-PARENT GENETIC POPULATIONS
entities.description: Genetic populations used for high-resolution trait mapping

entities.name: GENE DISCOVERY
entities.description: The process of identifying specific genes associated with traits

entities.name: DIAGNOSTIC MARKER DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of creating markers for trait identification

entities.name: DIAGNOSTIC MARKERS
entities.description: Genetic markers used for screening and breeding

entities.name: POPULATION SCREENING
entities.description: Using diagnostic markers to screen early generation populations

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED BACKCROSSING
entities.description: A breeding method using markers to introgress traits

entities.name: MOLECULAR BREEDING
entities.description: Breeding based on molecular tools to create new products

entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION
entities.description: A technology for predicting breeding values using genomic data

entities.name: SPEED BREEDING
entities.description: A technology to accelerate the breeding cycle

entities.name: MID-DENSITY GENOTYPING ASSAY
entities.description: A specific type of genotyping assay used in the breeding pipeline

entities.name: GENOME EDITING
entities.description: A technology for precise modification of the genome

entities.name: CLIMATE RESILIENCE
entities.description: The ability of the crop to be climate-smart and withstand environmental stress

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced, targeted for increase

entities.name: NUTRITION
entities.description: The nutritional quality and value of the groundnut

relationships.description: Low productivity is a challenge for groundnut
Groundnut is grown in the semiarid tropics
Genomics research is applied to groundnut
Genome sequencing performed on wild diploid progenitors
Genome sequencing performed on wild tetraploids
Genome sequencing performed on cultivated tetraploids
Resequencing is performed on diverse germplasm lines
Genotyping assays enable high-resolution trait mapping
Trait mapping uses germplasm diversity panels
Trait mapping uses multi-parent genetic populations
Trait mapping leads to precise gene discovery
Trait mapping leads to diagnostic marker development
Development process results in diagnostic markers
Diagnostic markers facilitate screening of early generation populations
Diagnostic markers facilitate marker-assisted backcrossing breeding
Marker-assisted backcrossing is a component of molecular breeding
Molecular breeding products are developed for groundnut
Genomic selection is applied to groundnut
Speed breeding is applied to groundnut

Genome editing is applied to groundnut
Genomic selection is used to develop high yielding varieties
